goal: Fix two ambiguous intra-doc links in crates/ucil-core/src/incremental.rs (introduced silently by WO-0009 commit 5c2739a) that cause cargo doc -p ucil-core --no-deps to emit hard errors. These regressions block the WO-0024 verifier gate (acceptance criterion #5 cargo doc). Bucket-D micro-WO synthesized by triage cap-rescue pass in response to escalation ucil-build/escalations/20260418-0820-pre-existing-incremental-rustdoc-bug.md.
plan_summary: Two 4-character edits in crates/ucil-core/src/incremental.rs lines 5-6. Replace `[`symbol_count`]` with `[`symbol_count()`]` and `[`dependent_metric`]` with `[`dependent_metric()`]`. rustdoc cannot disambiguate the unadorned intra-doc links because salsa::tracked fn <name> macro-expands to both a function AND a same-named struct; the `()` suffix is rustdoc's suggested fix (function form) and matches the surrounding prose (`query functions`). Verify no other ambiguous intra-doc link remains in the crate by running the cargo doc check before committing.
scope_in: crates/ucil-core/src/incremental.rs lines 5-6 — change `[`symbol_count`]` to `[`symbol_count()`]` and `[`dependent_metric`]` to `[`dependent_metric()`]`
acceptance: cargo nextest run -p ucil-core incremental:: all pass (regression guard; the existing 5 tests must still work)
git diff origin/main..HEAD --name-only touches only crates/ucil-core/src/incremental.rs
